title: JV-17 - User docs for model install, benchmark, privacy, fallback, and troubleshooting

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

labels.name: area: privacy
labels.description: Privacy, retention, consent, and local data protection

body:
## Summary

Update user and developer docs for local JA-VI MT after the benchmark decision.

## Why is this needed?

Users need honest setup guidance, privacy expectations, model size/license details, fallback consent, benchmark meaning, and troubleshooting.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- Decision ADR from JV-08.
- Provider behavior from JV-11/JV-12.
- Default behavior from JV-13.
- Release/update behavior from JV-18/JV-20.
- README, USAGE, PRIVACY, config.example, CHANGELOG.

## Outputs

- README and USAGE updates for local MT setup/default.
- PRIVACY update for local inference and optional Google fallback.
- config.example comments for mt_provider and mt_cloud_fallback.
- Troubleshooting for missing model, DLL, unsupported pair, benchmark failure, and update failure.

## Implementation approach

- Do not claim local MT is default until JV-13 lands.
- State model license and size clearly.
- Explain that key presence is not fallback consent.
- Link benchmark evidence and release notes.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Docs match actual defaults and feature flags.
- [ ] Non-developer path explains install/use without Rust tooling.
- [ ] Privacy docs mention what stays local and when Google can be called.
- [ ] Stale claims from PR #407 era are updated.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Docs grep gate for stale google/local defaults.
- [ ] config.example validates as JSON.
- [ ] Links and paths are checked.
- [ ] Docs review verdict CLEAN.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-08 and JV-13 for final default text.
- Can draft earlier with blocked status.

## Agent routing

Docs writer plus security review for privacy text.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-17
- Wave: D1 docs
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: documentation, area: docs, area: privacy, provider: local, priority:P1, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

Extends PR #407 after local MT proof; not a duplicate of LF-07 docs alignment.
